name: Notice.AAA6.JudgmentsOnline.PaidInFull.Claimant
titleEn: The claimant has been paid the full amount that they were owed
titleCy: Mae’r hawlydd wedi derbyn y swm llawn yr oedd yn ddyledus iddo.
descriptionEn: The claim is now settled and there’s no further action any party needs to take.
descriptionCy: Mae’r hawliad bellach wedi’i setlo ac nid oes angen i unrhyw barti gymryd unrhyw gamau pellach.
